name: sporting-director-game
description: A single-session football puzzle game: plan three Liverpool transfer windows as Director of Football.

scripts.generate:data: vite build --ssr scripts/generate-data.ts --outDir node_modules/.tmp/gen --emptyOutDir && node node_modules/.tmp/gen/generate-data.js
scripts.data:rebuild: cd scraper && .venv/bin/python -m pipeline.apply_review && cd .. && npm run generate:data
